official_sources.authority_note: Existing generated official answer owns the Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound keep_alive framed payload and input id.

question.network_framing: With compression threshold disabled, Conn::write_packet sends VarInt(length of official framed payload) followed by the official framed payload.

stop_boundary: This runtime-send probe observes the packet::send_keep_alive outgoing helper only; it does not prove spawn_reader echo behavior, full keep-alive response loop behavior, Configuration completion, or Play entry.
